channel.title: Educations on Gajab Jobs
channel.description: Recent content in Educations on Gajab Jobs

item.title: MP Board 10th -12th Exam Result 2026 - 15th April at 11:00 AM
item.description: MP बोर्ड (MPBSE) कक्षा 10वीं और 12वीं के रिजल्ट, मार्कशीट डाउनलोड, टॉपर सूची और सभी आधिकारिक अपडेट यहाँ उपलब्ध हैं।

item.title: MP Board 12th Result 2026: 15th April at 11:00 AM
item.description: MP Board 12th Result 2026 अप्रैल 2026 के अंत तक जारी होने की संभावना है। छात्र अपना रिजल्ट रोल नंबर से ऑनलाइन चेक कर सकते हैं।

item.title: MP Board 10th Result 2026 - 15th April at 11:00 AM
item.description: MP Board Class 10th Result 2026 जारी हो गया है। छात्र अब MPBSE की आधिकारिक वेबसाइट पर जाकर अपना रिजल्ट रोल नंबर से चेक कर सकते हैं। यहां आपको रिजल्ट लिंक, चेक करने की प्रक्रिया, पासिंग मार्क्स और सभी जरूरी जानकारी एक ही जगह मिलेगी।

item.title: MP Class 9th & 11th Result 2026 Check Online
item.description: MP Class 9th aur 11th ka result 2026 jaldi hi Madhya Pradesh School Education Department dwara jari kiya jayega। Students EMS portal par apna roll number dal kar aasani se result check kar sakte hain aur marksheet download kar sakte hain।

item.title: Rajasthan Board 12th Result 2026 Declared
item.description: The Rajasthan Board of Secondary Education (RBSE) is expected to announce the Class 10th and 12th Result 2026 on its official website. The exams are likely to be held in March 2026, and the results may be declared in May or June 2026. Students can check their results online using their roll number. The marksheet will be available online, and candidates should keep their details ready to access the result quickly from rajeduboard.rajasthan.gov.in.

item.title: Bihar Board 10th Result 2026 Declared | 12th Result Declared
item.description: Access Bihar Board BSEB 10th and 12th Result 2026 with direct result link, scorecard download, toppers details and all important board updates in one place.

item.title: MP Board 5th & 8th Result 2026 – Check Result Online
item.description: MP 5th & 8th Result 2026 kab aayega? Yahan se check kare apna result roll number se. Direct link, result date, aur complete process jane rskmp.in par.

item.title: UP Board 10th & 12th Result 2026 - Coming Soon
item.description: The UP Board Result 2026 for Class 10 and Class 12 examinations will be released online by UPMSP. Students can view their results with roll numbers and download their provisional marksheet and scorecard.
